case_title: BARAJAS, BERTHA VS JOHNSON, JENETTA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY BARAJAS, BERTHA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, JENETTA CALIFORNIA CHILDRENS CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
